scenarios.description: HP DV derived from LSBs of Atk/Def/Spe/Spc DVs (same as Gen 1)
scenarios.note: HP_DV = ((Atk & 1) << 3) | ((Def & 1) << 2) | ((Spe & 1) << 1) | (Spc & 1). With Atk=15,Def=14,Spe=15,Spc=15: HP_DV = (1<<3)|(0<<2)|(1<<1)|(1) = 11. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/pokemon/move_mon.asm

scenarios.description: Stat experience uses sqrt in the formula: stat += floor(sqrt(statExp) + 1) / 4 (ERRATA #1)
scenarios.note: StatExp contribution = floor(floor(sqrt(40000)) + 1) / 4 = floor(201/4) = 50. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/pokemon/move_mon.asm StatExp calculation

scenarios.description: Frozen Pokemon has 25/256 (~9.77%) chance to thaw each turn
scenarios.note: Thaw chance = 25/256 per turn on the frozen pokemon's turn. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/battle/effect_commands.asm FreezeStatus

scenarios.description: Light Ball doubles Pikachu's Special Attack in Gen 2
scenarios.note: Light Ball doubles Pikachu SpA. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/battle/core.asm ItemEffects LightBall

scenarios.description: Leftovers heals 1/16 max HP at end of turn, applied before status damage
scenarios.note: Turn order: Leftovers heal → poison damage. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/battle/core.asm EndOfTurn

scenarios.description: Badly poisoned (toxic) damage escalates: 1/16 → 2/16 → 3/16 per turn
scenarios.note: Toxic counter starts at 1, increments each turn. Damage = counter/16 * max_hp. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/battle/effect_commands.asm ToxicEffect

scenarios.description: Leech Seed drains 1/8 of the target's max HP each turn
scenarios.note: Leech Seed drains floor(max_hp / 8). Differs from Gen 1 (1/16). Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/battle/effect_commands.asm LeechSeed

scenarios.description: Sandstorm deals 1/16 max HP per turn to non-Rock/Ground/Steel types
scenarios.note: Sandstorm end-of-turn: floor(max_hp / 16) to non-immune. Rock/Ground/Steel immune. Source: pret/pokecrystal engine/battle/core.asm SandstormDamage
